ItacPersonItem.Notes: Capellari was abbot, poet and man of letters, and authored numerous poetic compositions. In 1670 he joined the Ricovrati Academy, where he delivered orally some of his compositions.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
